text:
BOTTOM LINE — Small caps crushed it, tech lagged, rotation accelerated.
IWM +2.16% led amid Big Tech earnings rotation into cyclicals; oil at $118 tempered risk-on flows despite Alphabet +6% cloud beat. Positioning shows protection demand with SPY PCR 1.16, yet breadth expanding via DIA/SPY vol gains signals accumulation.

INDICES — VIX 16.9 down vs 19.6 20d MA.
IWM +2.16%, DIA +1.63%, SPY +0.99%, QQQ +0.93%. Small > large by 1.17pp. Dollar -0.91% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated: DIA 1.2x, SPY 1.1x, RSP 1.1x gaining attention; XLB/XLRE/XLV 1.4x sectors. SPY vol_ratio 1.1x up+price up=accumulation, QQQ 0.9x down+price up=low-conviction. Declining: IJR 0.9x, QQQ 0.9x ignored.

SECTORS — XLI Industrials +2.74%, XLV Healthcare +2.21%, XLRE Real Estate +1.74%, XLP Staples +1.68%, XLY Discretionary +1.29%, XLC Comms +1.06%, XLE Energy +1.05%, XLB Materials +1.00%, XLF Financials +0.40%, XLK Technology +0.25%, XLU Utilities +0.13%.
Top 2 Industries: URA +6.67%, WGMI +6.15%; bottom 2: SOXX -3.67%, MSOS -3.50%.

THE 7s — Top 5: Energy +2.20% (XLE strongest, CVX weakest), Toll Road +1.62% (V strongest, URI weakest), Semi +1.00% (QCOM +4.00% strongest, TER -19.41% weakest), Old Staples +0.68%, Software +0.50%.
Bottom 5: Housing -2.19%, Fab -2.82% (QCOM strongest, TER weakest), Old Metals -2.93%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Hawk tally 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee). USD stress 46/100 Normal, CP-Tbill 97th percentile most stressed.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.16 elevated protection, skew +4.3% fear; QQQ PCR 1.29 skew +8.8%. IWM PCR 2.40 near GEX flip 249. VIX 16.9 below 19.6 MA complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil -2.35% despite $118 climb pressuring semis SOXX -3.67%; dollar -0.91% aiding small cap rotation.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 59.8 Neutral. Top movers: V +8.26% Toll Road, GD +7.99% Defense, QCOM +4.00% Semi. 20d momentum: XLK +18.23% best sector, Semi +51.04% best basket. Vol spikes: TER -19.41% Fab distribution.

WATCH — EWC +2.84% vol 7.5x country breakout; SPOT -12.43% vol 6.1x New Staples reversal; TER -19.41% vol 4.4x Fab gamma stress.
